textPlain: the article title and domain really had me thinking this was going to be about mandela effects
and I thought it was going to be about Spectre-like vulnerabilities
The good news is now you got tricked (accidentally, tbh) into reading about compilers!

It should be. I wouldn't know what the word "cornucopia" was without it being on the fruit of the loom logo but some IRL Men in Black agents must have changed that to keep the timeline from collapsing or something.
